groups.description: Each group represents a set of memories that should be merged into one. Only include groups of 2+ memories. Memories that are unique should NOT appear in any group.

memory_ids.description: IDs of the memories in this merge group.

merged_title.description: The consolidated title for the merged memory.

merged_content.description: The consolidated content for the merged memory, combining all unique information.

reason.description: Brief explanation of why these memories are duplicates or near-duplicates.
